overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded assassin walking through an ancient Egyptian construction site. The character moves through wooden scaffolding and past workers hauling a massive stone block under a bright desert sun, with an ancient city visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open construction yard with wooden scaffolding and cranes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the construction site toward a wooden structure entrance

entered.detail: tall wooden construction scaffolding with multiple levels and platforms
large wooden crane structure with counterweights for lifting stone blocks
rocky desert mountains forming the backdrop of the construction site
rising smoke from construction fires or torches near the scaffolding
stacked white limestone blocks ready for construction use

segments.scene_description: The assassin walks through an open construction yard under bright sunlight. Wooden scaffolding towers ahead with a large crane structure, while smoke rises from fires near the work area. Stacks of white stone blocks sit to the right, and desert mountains loom in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway through construction scaffolding

events.description: enters narrow wooden corridor formed by construction scaffolding beams

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow wooden corridor with beams and fencing on both sides

entered.detail: narrow passage formed by wooden beams and planks creating a covered walkway
rough wooden plank fencing lining the right side of the path

changed.to: left_mid and right_mid surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow wooden corridor formed by construction scaffolding. The space is enclosed with wooden fencing and beams, creating a sheltered passage. Light filters through gaps in the structure as the assassin moves toward the bright exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open construction area with workers hauling large stone block

events.description: exits wooden corridor into open area with workers pulling stone block on sled
cat runs across the path ahead, workers pulling stone block become clearly visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward a group of workers hauling a massive stone block on ropes and sled

notable_agents.action: group of workers straining to pull a massive stone block on a wooden sled
cat running across the dirt path in front of the character

entered.detail: massive rectangular stone block being hauled by workers on a sled
white stone buildings and temples of the ancient city visible in the distance
palm trees marking the edge of the city ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the scene opens to reveal workers straining to pull a massive stone monolith across the dirt. A cat darts across the path as the assassin approaches. The ancient city with its white stone buildings and palm trees becomes visible in the distance under the bright sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: outskirts of ancient city with scattered construction materials

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing toward the city center

agents.ego_description: walking past the workers and continuing toward the ancient city outskirts

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone pillars stacked near the construction site
temple buildings with distinctive columns visible within the city

changed.to: center_mid becoming more prominent in view

segments.scene_description: Moving past the workers hauling the stone block, the assassin continues toward the city outskirts. Stacked stone pillars line the left side of the path while the ancient city's temple structures become more prominent ahead. The construction scaffolding fades into the background as the character approaches the urban area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling Egyptian construction site that gradually opens up into a view of a distant ancient city. It begins in an open yard under bright sunlight, moving past towering wooden scaffolding and rising smoke toward stacks of white stone blocks. As the assassin enters a narrow corridor of wooden beams and fencing, the environment becomes enclosed and sheltered before the camera emerges back into the light. The scene then expands to reveal workers straining to pull a massive stone monolith across the dirt, with a cat darting across the path as the white buildings and palm trees of the city appear on the horizon. Finally, the camera moves past the hauling crew and lines of stacked pillars, leaving the scaffolding behind as the urban temple structures become prominent ahead.
